payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No claims from the article were stored.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable memory should be created from unavailable source content.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with mock result: 404 network error.
No article content was available to verify or store.

repair_options: Ask to remember only the fact that this URL was intended to be useful for memory architecture, if that provenance is sufficient.
